title: AI AssistantGuided DSA Practice: Hands-on with Azure OpenAI
summary: Show how CodeGrind’s AI assistant helps users solve DSA problems in real time, pairing AI guidance with live code execution.
core_message: CodeGrind now emphasizes AI-assisted problem solving: users can request hints, model-assisted explanations, and code verification through the Azure OpenAI integration, all within the interactive editor environment. This reinforces learning while maintaining a hands-on, gamified practice flow.
cta: Try AI-assisted practice now and compare your solution with AI-guided hints.
visual_brief: Short-form demo video: a user opens CodeGrind, selects a DSA problem, asks for a hint, and watches the AI assistant provide step-by-step guidance alongside live code execution and test results. Include UI highlights of the editor, AI chat, and Judge0 integration.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
